---
title: 'How much will we get when we sell the house?'
date: '2016-06-06T04:16:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Destination Coeur d''Alene, Idaho'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5883419142022834181'
blogger_filename: '/2016/06/how-much-will-we-get-when-we-sell-house.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Destination Coeur d_Alene, Idaho/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Moving Stuff'
  - 'Home Owner Stuff'
---

<br />
<h3>
Evaluating our home</h3>
<br />
<b>Worth:</b><br />
<br />
Approximately $145,000.00 value (give or take) as of 06/05/16 (an agent indicated that we could get more, possibly, under certain circumstances). Value could change by next year.<br />
<br />
<b>Owed:</b><br />
<br />
Approximately&nbsp;<span style="font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; text-align: -webkit-right;">$114,000.00 mortgage (give or take) as of 06/05/16</span><br />
<span style="font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; text-align: -webkit-right;"><br /></span>
<span style="font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; text-align: -webkit-right;"><b>Difference:</b></span><br />
<span style="font-family: Verdana, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; text-align: -webkit-right;"><br /></span>
Approximately $31,000.00 in sale proceeds, before fees, agent, and other closing costs.<br />
<br />
<b>Question:</b><br />
<br />
<b>How much are closing costs for the seller? How much does the agent cost?&nbsp;</b><br />
<br />
How convenient, a <a href="http://www.anytimeestimate.com/SELLER-CLOSING-COSTS/tx-home-seller-net.htm#" target="_blank">Texas Closing Cost Estimate for sellers</a>. Based on the estimated value and mortgage, a 1% agent commission, the net pocket from the sale of the house would be about $26,526.<br />
<br />
Of course, I have no idea if 1% is normal for an agent, or if it's more. And these figures are from an online tool, totally imaginary. I think this is a best case scenario.<br />
<br />
One site (<a href="http://www.mortgagecalculator.biz/c/commissions.php" target="_blank">here</a>) estimates a 6% commission for the sale of the house, resulting in a&nbsp;$8,700.00 cost, vs the $1,450 estimated below. $7,250.00 more.<br />
<br />
In that scenario, &nbsp;the net take home from the sale is closer to $19,276.<br />
<br />
Dang... Maybe I should get a Real Estate License. If I only sold homes worth $145,000; I'd only have to sell 6 homes a year to be comfortable. Over that is gravy. Hmm... Something to consider.<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/closing-1-d80db8a0b1f3.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="144" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/closing-1-c747ec1489d4.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/closing-2-4b6c87e9af45.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="171" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/closing-2-514b901dad39.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/closing-3-407062ec8c3f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="15" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/closing-3-5cabded656d5.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/closing-4-732751efc7d7.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="17" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/closing-4-87c969f8324a.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/closing-5-2917b64b48a0.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="16" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/closing-5-fefa7a5c83af.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
Darrell
